Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
T-MSIS TAF Annual Provider RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.3 2 

AFLTD_PGM_TYPE_CD 

LABEL: Affiliated Program Type Code 

DESCRIPTION: A code to identify the category of program with which the provider is affiliated. 

SHORT NAME: AFLTD_PGM_TYPE_CD 

LONG NAME: AFLTD_PGM_TYPE_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

FILE(S): APR Affiliated Programs 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual provider TAF 

VALUES: 1 = National Health Plan (NHP-ID) 
2 =
